Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bai Rou]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou is Renfei's partner in the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou's Goldsign is bright yellow eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou wears a hat woven from dried stalks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou is present with Renfei and Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou wears green armor and has glowing yellow eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Bai Rou is a Skysworn who can forge Amberwell madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Bai Rou has yellow eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Bai Rou is massive and wears a woven straw hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Bai Rou is a Skysworn with yellow eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Bai Rou is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Bai Rou uses manacles containing halfsilver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Bai Rou is a member of the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Bai Rou has an emerald Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Bai Rou let out a roar when he saw her.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Bai Rou marched Yerin into the hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou can use yellow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou used yellow madra swirling around his gauntlet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou's eyes glowed yellow from within the shade of his hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou's madra can eat through the mind and flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou is a stage more advanced than Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou uses a Ruler technique to command water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou is a Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Bai Rou has a thin, white replacement arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Bai Rou is an individual who could decide whether or not to keep Lindon's apprentices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Bai Rou wears heavy armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Bai Rou is a person Yerin was looking for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin fought Bai Rou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Bai Rou is a person who may have attacked or abandoned Yerin.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Bai Rou was kidnapped and assaulted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou says the group is a calamity waiting to happen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Bai Rou is a person Naru Gwei is involved with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Bai Rou was seen against the railing wearing a wide straw hat.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
